message: CamPart A powerful Camera-Part-Setter __________________________________________________ Description CamPart is a free Roblox Studio Plugin developed by Seem

>. It allows you to focus your camera instantly on any BasePart. The plugin includes a Realtime-Viewer (ViewportFrame) for environment rendering within a custom radius. Documentation | YouTube Guide Features ● CamPart Panel - Camera to Selected: Instant focus. - Rotate (+/- 10): Horizontal Y-Axis rotation. ● RealtimeView Panel 1. Select Part 2. Enable 3. Refresh - Radius: Set via positive number (visualized by sphere). - DragableEdge: Dynamic UI adjustment. - Sync: Align Studio Viewport with RealtimeView. ● Message Panel Stay updated on news and bugfixes. A small bell 🔔

> will notify you of important assets or updates from </font><font color="#00A2FF">Seem</font><font color="#D6D6D6">.</font>
